title: AppLovin (NASDAQ:APP) – Why AppLovin Shares Are Rising During Monday's After-Hours Session
text: AppLovin Corp (NASDAQ: APP) shares are trading higher by 2.86% to $29.33 during Monday's after-hours session after the company announced it does not intend to submit another proposal to combine with Unity and has withdrawn its Aug. 9 proposal.

title: AppLovin gives up quest to merge with Unity Software
text: AppLovin Inc. executives announced Monday that they are giving up an effort to merge with Unity Software Inc.

title: AppLovin abandons effort to acquire Unity after $20 billion bid was rejected
text: AppLovin said it now sees its path as an independent company as better for shareholders.
